text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating vegetables and going to the gym. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, lean proteins, and whole grains, gives your body essential energy and nutrients. Combining this with regular exercise, such as walking or cycling a few times a week, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep—aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover. However, physical health is only part of the picture. Pay attention to your mental health by managing stress and taking breaks. Finally, maintain a good work-life balance. Make time for hobbies and loved ones, as this supports your overall well-being, helping you feel happier and more energetic every day.
